channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US support for Israel slips as Democrats grow more critical, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll reveals a dramatic erosion of support for Israel, after decades of bipartisan backing.

item.title: More video expected during hearing in case against man accused of killing Charlie Kirk
The family of a man shot by the Tennessee National Guard demands release of video
